sqlReaderQuery.value:
select 
CinemaCode as cinema_code,
CinemaName as cinema_name,
MovieId as movie_id,
TicketCount as ticket_count,
TicketPrice as ticket_price,
TransactionId as transaction_id,
TransactionDt as transaction_date
 from dbo.Tickets where TransactionDt > '@{activity('act_gen_LookupOldWaterMark').output.firstRow.WatermarkValue}' and TransactionDt <= '@{activity('act_gen_LookupNewWaterMark').output.firstRow.NewWatermarkValue}'

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT TableName
      ,WatermarkValue
  FROM dbo.watermarktable
  WHERE TableName = 'cinema_tickets'
SELECT MAX (TransactionDt) AS NewWatermarkValue FROM dbo.Tickets

SELECT TableName, WatermarkValue
  FROM dbo.watermarktable
  WHERE TableName = 'online_json'

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select 
'@{pipeline().RunId}' as pipeline_run_id,
'@{pipeline().Pipeline}' as pipeline_name,
'@{formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(pipeline().TriggerTime,'UTC','Central European Standard Time'),'yyyyMMdd_HH:mm:ss')}' as pipeline_trigger_time,
'@{formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(variables('varPLStartTime'),'UTC','Central European Standard Time'),'yyyyMMdd_HH:mm:ss')}' as execution_start_time,
'@{formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(variables('varPLEndTime'),'UTC','Central European Standard Time'),'yyyyMMdd_HH:mm:ss')}' as execution_end_time

body.value:
{ "subject":"Pipeline @{pipeline().Pipeline} finished. Status: ", "message":"

Pipeline run finished successfully.

Data Factory Name: @{pipeline().DataFactory}
Pipeline Name: @{pipeline().Pipeline}
Pipeline Run Id: @{pipeline().RunId}

This email was generated automatically. Please do not respond to it.

" }

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select 
  container,
  folder,
  file_name,
  column_delimiter,
  encoding,
  escape_char,
  quote_char,
  dest_schema,
  dest_table_name,
  DIU_val,
  mapping 
from etl.tControlMetadata

body.value:
{ "subject":"Pipeline @{pipeline().Pipeline} finished. Status: Succeeded", "message":"

Pipeline run finished successfully.

Data Factory Name: @{pipeline().DataFactory}
Pipeline Name: @{pipeline().Pipeline}
Pipeline Run Id: @{pipeline().RunId}

This email was generated automatically. Please do not respond to it.

" }

{ "subject":"Pipeline @{pipeline().Pipeline} finished. Status: Failed", "message":"

Pipeline run failed.

Data Factory Name: @{pipeline().DataFactory}
Pipeline Name: @{pipeline().Pipeline}
Pipeline Run Id: @{pipeline().RunId}
Error: @{activity('act_gen_lookup_get_error').output.firstRow.error_msg}

This email was generated automatically. Please do not respond to it.

" }

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select distinct
  error_msg
from etl.tControlMetadataErrorLog
where pipeline_id = '@{pipeline().RunId}'

properties.description: Linked Service to the Azure Blob Storage azurementoringstorageea

scriptLines: selectDim derive(TransactionDate = toInteger( replace( toString(TransactionDate,'yyyy-MM-dd'), '-','') )) ~> yyyyMMdd

query: 'select 
    cast(format(op.TransactionDate,'yyyyMMdd') as int) as DateKey
   ,cast(format(op.TransactionDate,'yyyyMM') as int) as MonthKey
   ,op.Price
   ,op.TransactionId
   ,os.ServiceCode
   ,m.MovieIdNK
from dbo.test_tOnlinePurchase op
left join dbo.tOnlineService os ON os.ServiceId = op.ServiceId
left join dbo.tMovies m ON m.MovieId = op.MovieId',
query: 'select ServiceCode, ServiceKey as OnlineServiceKey\nfrom dbo.DimOnlineService',
